LAW AND MOTION 302, JUDGE MILLER DISCLOSED THAT SHE KNOWS MR. SCHOENBERGER. THEY TAUGHT TOGETHER IN 2000. SHE HAS NOT SEEN HIM SOCIALLY. THIS FACT DOES NOT AFFECT THE COURT'S ABILITY TO BE FAIR AND IMPARTIAL IN THIS CASE. THE COURT GAVE COUNSEL THE OPPORTUNITY TO ASK QUESTIONS. NO QUESTIONS WERE ASKED OR OBJECTIONS WERE RAISED. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. DEFENDANTS MOSCONE CENTER JOINT VENTURE AND CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILS TO MAINTAIN ITS INITIAL SUMMARY JUDGMENT BURDEN. DEFENDANT'S MOTION PERTAINS TO WHETHER IT HAD NOTICE THAT THERE WAS WATER ON THE FLOOR, BUT LACK OF NOTICE IS NOT A BASIS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT WHERE PLAINTIFFS ALLEGE DEFENDANT ACTUALLY & NEGLIGENTLY CREATED THE DANGEROUS CONDITION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-04-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. SARA M. PETERS OF THE LAW OFFICES OF WALKUP, MELODIA & SCHOENBERGER, TEL. NO. 981-7210 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. RICHARD L. GILLESPIE OF THE ARCHER NORRIS LAW CORPORATION, TEL. NO. (925) 930-6600 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT MOSCONE CENTER.

RULING - Judge Miller disclosed that she knows Mr. Schoenberger. They taught together in 2000. She has not seen him socially. This fact does not affect the Court's ability to be fair and impartial in this case. The Court gave counsel the opportunity to ask questions. No questions were asked or objections were raised. The matter was argued. DEFENDANTS MOSCONE CENTER JOINT VENTURE AND CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILS TO MAINTAIN ITS INITIAL SUMMARY JUDGMENT BURDEN. DEFENDANT'S MOTION PERTAINS TO WHETHER IT HAD NOTICE THAT THERE WAS WATER ON THE FLOOR, BUT LACK OF NOTICE IS NOT A BASIS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT WHERE PLAINTIFFS ALLEGE DEFENDANT ACTUALLY & NEGLIGENTLY CREATED THE DANGEROUS CONDITION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185
